Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Randomness on Apple Platforms (2024) 44 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Show HN: Git bayesect – Bayesian Git bisection for non-deterministic bugs 55 upvotes, 6 comments
  3. The AI Marketing BS Index 64 upvotes, 8 comments
  4. CERN levels up with new superconducting karts 364 upvotes, 80 comments
  5. Chess in SQL 170 upvotes, 42 comments
  6. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 527 upvotes, 158 comments
  7. Windows 95 defenses against installers that overwrite a file with an older one 25 upvotes, 3 comments
  8. An Introduction to Writing Systems and Unicode 35 upvotes, 6 comments
  9. Claude Code Unpacked : A visual guide 987 upvotes, 353 comments
  10. Intuiting Pratt Parsing 129 upvotes, 42 comments
  11. Is BGP safe yet? 209 upvotes, 74 comments
  12. Ada and Spark on ARM Cortex-M – A Tutorial with Arduino and Nucleo Examples 47 upvotes, 14 comments
  13. Show HN: CLI to order groceries via reverse-engineered REWE API (Haskell) 183 upvotes, 78 comments
  14. StepFun 3.5 Flash is #1 cost-effective model for OpenClaw tasks (300 battles) 97 upvotes, 37 comments
  15. Claude Wrote a Full FreeBSD Remote Kernel RCE with Root Shell (CVE-2026-4747) 215 upvotes, 96 comments
  16. Show HN: Real-time dashboard for Claude Code agent teams 55 upvotes, 19 comments
  17. You're still signing data structures the wrong way 19 upvotes, 4 comments
  18. Consider the Greenland Shark (2020) 74 upvotes, 30 comments
  19. Artemis II astronauts arrive at launch pad 39B in an astrovan 41 upvotes, 16 comments
  20. NASA Artemis II moon mission live launch broadcast 241 upvotes, 144 comments
  21. Apple at 50 57 upvotes, 30 comments
  22. EmDash – a spiritual successor to WordPress that solves plugin security 340 upvotes, 241 comments
  23. TurboQuant KV Compression and SSD Expert Streaming for M5 Pro and IOS 60 upvotes, 34 comments
  24. Ukrainian Drone Holds Position for 6 Weeks 86 upvotes, 53 comments
  25. The OpenAI Graveyard: All the Deals and Products That Haven't Happened 170 upvotes, 130 comments
  26. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (April 2026) 141 upvotes, 116 comments
  27. AI for American-produced cement and concrete 96 upvotes, 79 comments
  28. Random numbers, Persian code: A mysterious signal transfixes radio sleuths 90 upvotes, 91 comments
  29. Show HN: Zerobox – Sandbox any command with file, network, credential controls 59 upvotes, 63 comments
